name: Chicken & Oyster Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve the back, wings, and neck of the chicken for later use.
2. Wash the remaining pieces and dry them.
3. Dredge the chicken in a mixture of flour, 1/8 teaspoon salt, and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
4. Brown the chicken on all sides in hot fat.
5. Remove the browned chicken to a 2-quart casserole dish.
6. Add boiling water to cover the chicken, then cover and bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 1 hour, or until tender.
7. Stir in heavy cream, remaining salt, pepper, and oysters.
8. Cover and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Sprinkle with toasted almonds before serving hot with baking powder biscuits, if desired.
Makes 4 servings.
